info.title: Lightspeed Restaurant L-Series API
info.description: REST API for Lightspeed Restaurant L-Series (legacy restaurant POS). Provides access to company data, customers, products, orders, receipts, reservations, labour, and analytics. Access is limited to approved partners and developers.

post.summary: Request or refresh an access token
post.description: Obtain an access token using either an authorization_code grant (initial token request with PKCE) or a refresh_token grant (token refresh). Use grant_type=authorization_code with code, code_verifier, and redirect_uri for initial authentication. Use grant_type=refresh_token with refresh_token for subsequent refreshes. Both flows require HTTP Basic authentication with client_id as username and client_secret as password.

get.description: Retrieve aggregated product sales data for a given date range. Each record includes the product name, VAT, quantity sold, prices, cost, and profit.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date for the report (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date for the report (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Single date for the report (YYYY-MM-DD). Alternative to from/to range.

get.description: Retrieve all companies accessible to the authenticated user.
Retrieve details for a specific company by its ID.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier for the company

patch.description: Partially update a company using JSON Patch operations. Commonly used to configure PMS integration settings (genericPmsApiUrl, genericPmsApiUser, genericPmsApiPassword).

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier for the company

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers. Supports filtering by text query, email, and modification date.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term to filter customers by name

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter customers by email address

parameters.name: modifiedSince
parameters.description: Return only customers modified after this timestamp (ISO-8601)

parameters.name: sortField
parameters.description: Field to sort results by

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Sort direction (asc or desc)

post.description: Create a new customer record. Returns the integer ID of the newly created customer.

201.description: Customer created; body contains the new customer ID

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific customer by their ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

put.description: Replace all mutable fields of an existing customer. The request body must include the customer id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

get.summary: Get current credit balance for a customer
get.description: Retrieve the current credit balance for a specific customer. Returns a single number.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

get.summary: List credit changes for a customer
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of credit change records for a specific customer.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

post.summary: Create a credit change for a customer
post.description: Add or subtract credits from a customer's balance.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

change.description: Amount to add (positive) or subtract (negative) from the customer's credits

post.summary: Create a loyalty card for a customer
post.description: Assign a loyalty card to a customer by barcode.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

barcode.description: Barcode value for the loyalty card

delete.summary: Delete a loyalty card from a customer
delete.description: Remove a loyalty card from a customer by its UUID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

parameters.name: loyaltyCardUUID
parameters.description: The UUID of the loyalty card

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

get.description: Retrieve all establishments (locations) belonging to the company.
Retrieve a paginated list of restaurant floor plans with their tables.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: Whether to include non-visible floors. Default is true; use false for all floors.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific floor by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the floor

get.summary: List tables for a specific floor
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of tables belonging to a specific floor.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the floor

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: Whether to return non-visible tables. Default is true; use false for all tables.

parameters.name: withStatus
parameters.description: Include table status information in the response

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific table by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the table

post.description: Create a new payment type. Returns the integer ID of the newly created payment type.

201.description: Payment type created; body contains the new payment type ID

get.description: Retrieve receipts for a certain date or date range. Supports filtering by status, customer, and modification date.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Single date to retrieve receipts for (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date of the range (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date of the range (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: useModification
parameters.description: If true, date filters apply to modification time instead of creation time

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter receipts by status

parameters.name: receiptId
parameters.description: Filter by specific receipt ID

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Filter by customer ID

parameters.name: customerUuid
parameters.description: Filter by customer UUID

parameters.name: modifiedSince
parameters.description: Return only receipts modified after this timestamp (ISO-8601)

parameters.name: condenseItems
parameters.description: If true, condense duplicate line items into single entries with aggregated amounts

get.description: Retrieve a list of products (menu items). Supports filtering by name and pagination.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term to filter products by name

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific product by its ID.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the product

patch.description: Partially update a product using JSON Patch operations.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the product

put.description: Replace all mutable fields of an existing product.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the product

delete.description: Delete a specific product by its ID.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the product

get.description: Retrieve all subproducts (child items) associated with a specific product.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the parent product

post.summary: Add multiple subproducts to a product
post.description: Associate multiple subproducts with a parent product by providing an array of subproduct IDs.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the parent product

schema.description: Array of subproduct IDs to add

delete.summary: Remove multiple subproducts from a product
delete.description: Remove multiple subproduct associations from a parent product by providing an array of subproduct IDs.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the parent product

schema.description: Array of subproduct IDs to remove

post.summary: Add a subproduct to a product
post.description: Associate a single subproduct with a parent product.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the parent product

parameters.name: subProductId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the subproduct

delete.summary: Remove a subproduct from a product
delete.description: Remove a single subproduct association from a parent product.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the parent product

parameters.name: subProductId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the subproduct

get.description: Retrieve all additions (modifiers) available in the inventory, including their values and linked products.
Retrieve timed events (e.g., happy hours, promotions) that apply price adjustments to products on a schedule.

parameters.name: includePastEvents
parameters.description: Whether to include events that have already ended

get.description: Retrieve the last modification timestamps for products, product groups, modifiers, and timed events. Useful for cache invalidation.
Retrieve a list of product groups (categories). Supports filtering by name and pagination.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term to filter product groups by name

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific product group by its ID.

parameters.name: productgroupId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the product group

get.summary: List products within a product group
get.description: Retrieve products belonging to a specific product group.

parameters.name: productgroupId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the product group

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term to filter products by name

200.description: List of products in the group

post.summary: Create a product in a product group
post.description: Create a new product and add it to the specified product group.

parameters.name: productgroupId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the product group

get.description: Retrieve clock-in/clock-out records for all users. Supports filtering by time range and modification date.

parameters.name: minClockInTime
parameters.description: Minimum clock-in time filter (ISO-8601)

parameters.name: maxClockOutTime
parameters.description: Maximum clock-out time filter (ISO-8601)

parameters.name: changedSince
parameters.description: Return only records changed after this timestamp (ISO-8601)

get.summary: Get clock times for a specific user
get.description: Retrieve clock-in/clock-out records for a specific user.

parameters.name: userid
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the user

parameters.name: minClockInTime
parameters.description: Minimum clock-in time filter (ISO-8601)

parameters.name: maxClockOutTime
parameters.description: Maximum clock-out time filter (ISO-8601)

parameters.name: changedSince
parameters.description: Return only records changed after this timestamp (ISO-8601)

200.description: List of clock time records for the user

get.description: Retrieve a list of employees. Supports filtering by visibility and pagination.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: Whether to include non-visible employees

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific employee by their user ID.

parameters.name: userid
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the employee (user ID)

get.description: Convert a liteserver receipt ID to the cloud receipt ID. Returns the cloud receipt ID as an integer.

parameters.name: liteserverReceiptId
parameters.description: The liteserver receipt ID to convert

get.description: Retrieve a list of all online orders. Supports filtering by status and creation date.

parameters.name: status

parameters.name: createdSince

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific online order by its ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the order

get.summary: List online orders for a customer
get.description: Retrieve online orders belonging to a specific customer.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by order status

parameters.name: createdSince
parameters.description: Return orders created after this timestamp (ISO-8601)

post.summary: Create an online order for a customer
post.description: Create a new online order for a specific customer. Returns the integer ID of the newly created order.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

201.description: Order created; body contains the new order ID

get.summary: Get a specific order for a customer
get.description: Retrieve details for a specific online order belonging to a customer.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the order

patch.description: Partially update an online order for a customer (e.g., change status).

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the order

post.summary: Create an establishment order for a customer
post.description: Create a new order for a specific establishment and customer. Uses PLU codes instead of product IDs. Returns the integer ID of the newly created order.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The numerical identifier of the customer

201.description: Establishment order created; body contains the new order ID

get.description: Retrieve all payment types available for online ordering.
Retrieve all tax classes configured for online ordering.

post.description: Calculate tax totals for an order without creating it. Useful for previewing tax amounts before submission.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of reservations. Supports filtering by date, floor, table, customer, user, and modification time.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Filter by reservation date (ISO-8601)

parameters.name: floorId
parameters.description: Filter by floor ID

parameters.name: tableId
parameters.description: Filter by table ID

parameters.name: modifiedSince
parameters.description: Return only reservations modified after this timestamp (ISO-8601)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter by user ID who created the reservation

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Filter by customer ID

parameters.name: changedAfter
parameters.description: Return reservations changed after this timestamp (ISO-8601)

201.description: Reservation created; body contains the new reservation ID

get.description: Retrieve the reservation configuration settings for the establishment.
Retrieve tables that are available for a specific date, time range, and minimum seating capacity.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date to check availability (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start time for the reservation window (HH:mm)

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End time for the reservation window (HH:mm)

parameters.name: minimumSeats
parameters.description: Minimum number of seats required

Error.description: Standard error response from the API

TokenRequest.description: OAuth2 token request body. Use grant_type=authorization_code for initial token or grant_type=refresh_token for refresh.

redirect_uri.description: Client redirect URI (required for authorization_code grant)

code.description: Authorization code from the redirect (required for authorization_code grant)

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier, base64url encoded (required for authorization_code grant)

refresh_token.description: Refresh token from a previous token response (required for refresh_token grant)

TokenResponse.description: OAuth2 token response containing access and refresh tokens

access_token.description: JWT access token for authenticating API requests

refresh_token.description: Token used to obtain a new access token when it expires

expires_in.description: Number of seconds until the access token expires (typically 3600)

offset.description: Starting position of the first record

openingTime.description: Daily opening time in HH:mm format

streetName.description: Street name of the company address

streetNumber.description: Street number of the company address

creationTime.description: Timestamp when the company was created

Establishment.description: An individual location/establishment within a company

openingTime.description: Daily opening time in HH:mm format

streetName.description: Street name of the establishment address

streetNumber.description: Street number of the establishment address

creationTime.description: Timestamp when the establishment was created

Customer.description: A customer record with contact, delivery, and loyalty information

uuid.description: Universally unique identifier for the customer

companyId.description: ID of the company this customer belongs to

customerCards.description: Loyalty and gift cards associated with this customer

CustomerUpdate.description: Fields for updating an existing customer

CustomerCard.description: A loyalty or gift card associated with a customer

mainEstablishmentMasterId.description: ID of the main establishment where the card was issued

creationUserId.description: ID of the user who created the card

generatedDate.description: Timestamp when the card was generated (epoch millis)

originalValue.description: Original monetary value loaded on the card

remainingValue.description: Remaining monetary value on the card

soldValue.description: Total value that has been sold/loaded

redeemedValue.description: Total value that has been redeemed

customerId.description: ID of the customer who owns this card

customerUuid.description: UUID of the customer who owns this card

CreditChange.description: A record of a credit balance change for a customer

changeQuantity.description: Amount of the credit change (positive for additions, negative for deductions)

creationUserId.description: ID of the user who created this change

creationTime.description: Timestamp when the credit change was created

Floor.description: A restaurant floor plan containing tables

capacity.description: Maximum seating capacity for the floor

floorId.description: ID of the floor this table belongs to

seats.description: Number of seats at the table

type.description: Table type (e.g., restaurant, bar, takeaway, delivery, tab, takeaway_simple)

ProductSales.description: Aggregated sales data for a single product

costVatExcl.description: Cost of goods sold excluding VAT

Product.description: A menu item or product in the inventory

visible.description: Whether the product is visible on the POS

kitchenImageLocation.description: URL of the kitchen display image

cfdImageLocation.description: URL of the customer-facing display image

productType.description: Product type (e.g., empty string for regular, CHOICE, REDUCTIONALLPERCENTAGE, REDUCTIONALL)

groupIds.description: IDs of the product groups this product belongs to

SubProduct.description: A child product linked to a parent product

Addition.description: A modifier/addition group that can be applied to products

displayName.description: Display name shown to customers (may differ from name)

values.description: Available values/options within this addition group

multiselect.description: Whether multiple values can be selected simultaneously

minSelectedAmount.description: Minimum number of values that must be selected

maxSelectedAmount.description: Maximum number of values that can be selected (-1 for unlimited)

productLinks.description: Product IDs this addition is linked to

AdditionValue.description: A single option within an addition group

default.description: Whether this value is selected by default

TimedEvent.description: A scheduled promotion or price adjustment (e.g., happy hour)

daysOfTheWeek.description: Boolean array for each day of the week (Mon-Sun) indicating if the event is active

activeTimeFrom.description: Start time of the active period (HH:mm)

activeTimeTo.description: End time of the active period (HH:mm)

startDate.description: Date when the event becomes effective

priority.description: Priority when multiple events overlap (higher wins)

ModificationTimes.description: Last modification timestamps for various inventory entities, useful for cache invalidation

products.description: Last time any product was modified

productGroups.description: Last time any product group was modified

modifiers.description: Last time any modifier/addition was modified

timedEvents.description: Last time any timed event was modified

visible.description: Whether the group is visible on the POS

shortcutCategory.description: Whether this group appears as a shortcut category

products.description: Products in this group (may be empty in list responses)

PaymentTypeCreate.description: Request body for creating a new payment type

name.description: Display name for the payment type

typeId.description: Numeric type identifier for the payment method category

tableId.description: Table where the order was placed

floorId.description: Floor where the order was placed

ReceiptItem.description: A line item on a receipt

ReceiptPayment.description: A payment entry on a receipt

ClockTime.description: A clock-in/clock-out record for an employee

clockInLastModifiedDate.description: Last modification time of the clock-in record

clockOutLastModifiedDate.description: Last modification time of the clock-out record

clockInLastModifiedUserId.description: User who last modified the clock-in record

clockOutLastModifiedUserId.description: User who last modified the clock-out record

OnlineOrder.description: An online order with items, payments, and status

deliveryDate.description: Scheduled delivery or pickup date and time

creationDate.description: Timestamp when the order was created

receiptId.description: Associated receipt ID (0 if not yet processed)

numberOfCustomers.description: Number of customers for the order

tableId.description: Table assigned to the order (0 if none)

OnlineOrderCreate.description: Request body for creating a new online order

deliveryDate.description: Scheduled delivery or pickup date and time

OnlineOrderUpdate.description: Request body for updating an online order

OrderItem.description: A single item within an online order

productPlu.description: Product PLU/SKU code (used in establishment orders)

OrderModifier.description: A modifier applied to an order item

modifierValueId.description: ID of the selected modifier value

plu.description: PLU code for the modifier (used in establishment orders)

OrderPayment.description: A payment entry for an online order

OnlinePaymentType.description: A payment type available for online orders

TaxClass.description: A tax class configuration for online ordering

customerId.description: Customer who made the reservation (-1 if walk-in)

floorId.description: Floor ID for the reserved table

ReservationCreate.description: Request body for creating a reservation

customerId.description: Customer who is making the reservation

enabled.description: Whether the reservation system is enabled

minLeadTime.description: Minimum lead time in minutes before a reservation can be made

JsonPatchRequest.description: JSON Patch request body containing an array of patch operations

path.description: JSON Pointer to the target field

value.description: New value for the field (required for add, replace, test)
